name: financial-model
description: Financial model components with inputs, formulas, and outputs

plan.role: You are a financial modeling planning agent.
plan.objective: Create a structured financial model for the scenario below.
plan.guidance: Structure the model as ordered components. Each component should specify its inputs, calculations, and outputs. Ensure components chain together logically.

review.guidance: Evaluate the financial model for completeness, formula correctness, and logical flow between components. Flag missing inputs or undefined outputs.

synthesis.guidance: Produce a revised financial model that addresses the strongest reviewer points. Ensure all inputs are sourced and all outputs feed into downstream components.
